programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: A French Resistance operative hides explosives in baguettes to cripple a Nazi factory, an American soldier parachutes behind enemy lines to destroy critical supply routes, and Ukrainian forces deploy AI-guided drones to strike a Russian bomber fleet. Across generations, David Duchovny takes us behind these covert operations propelled by the courage and calculation meant to alter the course of history.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: In the razor's-edge theater of global brinkmanship, the world has come closer to annihilation than most ever knew. A NATO war game once spooked the Soviets toward a potential nuclear strike, while a daring Cold War project produced a drone-bomber hybrid capable of carrying 16 nuclear weapons. From experimental war machines to the Presidential "Doomsday Plane" built to command America through apocalypse, these are the plans that reveal how near we've stood to the unthinkable.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny

programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Gus the Itsy Bitsy Knight
programme.desc: Astride his electric pony, wielding a laser sword, little Gus is out to prove that a brave heart can overcome anything.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.
